//1: THE PROFILE (GitHub-sourced) — this single file binds skills + MCP +
//2: system prompt + settings into one activatable 'perspective', ALL from
//5: 'source' to your fork (owner/repo), and replace the REPLACE_WITH_* values.
//6: Then copy this file to ~/.snowflake/cortex/profiles/ or run /setup-profile.
//8: Full schema + accepted source formats: docs/PROFILE_SCHEMA.md.
//9: Note: these //-prefixed keys are comments; the app ignores them on load.
name: Team Perspective
description: Starter team perspective: friendly persona, starter skills, and MCP — all from GitHub. Fork and customize.

skillRepos.//: Folder of skills. The app clones the repo and registers every SKILL.md found here.

mcpServers.//: Points at the mcp.json file in this repo. Activation loads those servers.

systemPromptRepo.//: The persona / behavior rules. Applied as the active system prompt on activation.

settingsOverrides.//: Applied to settings on activation. Remove the connection keys if you have none.
